tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Execution-time preflight gate: validate the add-on Planning Pack and smoke/playbook scaffolding before starting WFGADAXA0.
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/world-fs-granular-allow-deny-APPENDIX-addon-v3-alignment"
Read: plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, quality_gate_report.md, manual_testing_playbook.md, specs, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Complete execution_preflight_report.md with ACCEPT/REVISE + required fixes
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings

tasks.name: CI checkpoint CP1
tasks.description: Checkpoint after WFGADAXA0/WFGADAXA1/WFGADAXA2: dispatch compile parity + feature smoke per ci_checkpoint_plan.md (ci-audit may recommend skip).
acceptance_criteria: Run: scripts/ci-audit/ci_audit.sh --ledger-path "$FEATURE_DIR/logs/WFGADAXA2/ci-audit/ledger.jsonl" --kind ci-testing --orch-branch "$ORCH_REF" → exit 0 (record RECOMMENDATION lines in session_log.md)

Run: scripts/ci-audit/ci_audit.sh --ledger-path "$FEATURE_DIR/logs/WFGADAXA2/ci-audit/ledger.jsonl" --kind feature-smoke --orch-branch "$ORCH_REF" --feature-dir "$FEATURE_DIR" → exit 0 (record RECOMMENDATION lines in session_log.md)
If ci-audit recommends RUN for ci-testing: Run: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="$ORCH_REF" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 CI_CHECKOUT_REF="$CHECKOUT_SHA" → exit 0

If ci-audit recommends RUN for feature-smoke: Run: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="$FEATURE_DIR" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="WFGADAXA2" SMOKE_CHECKOUT_REF="$CHECKOUT_SHA" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="$ORCH_REF" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=0 → exit 0
Record: session_log.md includes ORCH_REF, CHECKOUT_SHA, ci-audit RECOMMENDATION lines, and dispatched run URLs/ids (or explicit SKIP)
start_checklist: Read: ci_checkpoint_plan.md and kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Record evidence in session_log.md
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs
